# kiran-vm

> Self-hosted server infrastructure on Oracle Cloud Always Free ARM. Provisions a VM with Pulumi, hardens and installs services with Ansible, then manages Docker app deployments through Komodo. A `git push` to `stacks/<name>/` automatically redeploys the matching app via GitHub Actions and Komodo webhooks.

The stack: OCI ARM VM → Ubuntu 22.04 → Docker → shared Postgres 16 + Redis → Komodo (deploy UI) → Caddy (reverse proxy with Cloudflare DNS-01 TLS) → app containers.

Key facts for automation:
- SSH is on port **2222**, user `deploy`
- Postgres container is named `infra-postgres-1`, accessible inside `infra_net` Docker network
- App containers must join `infra_net` to reach Postgres and Redis
- Komodo secrets use `[[SECRET_NAME]]` syntax in compose files, not env files
- `TZ` is a reserved variable in Komodo — use app-specific alternatives (e.g. `N8N_TZ` for n8n)
- Pulumi uses a local file backend (`~/.pulumi/stacks/`), not Pulumi Cloud
- Pulumi passphrase is stored in `~/.pulumi-passphrase`, pointed to by `PULUMI_CONFIG_PASSPHRASE_FILE`

## Provisioning

- [infra/README.md](./infra/README.md): Pulumi setup — OCI config, passphrase file, deploy and teardown commands, full config reference
- [ansible/README.md](./ansible/README.md): Ansible setup — role list with tags, secrets reference, how to re-run individual roles

## Deploying apps

- [stacks/README.md](./stacks/README.md): Komodo stack setup, secret injection, n8n gotchas, adding new stacks, troubleshooting

## Optional

- [stacks/sure/compose.yaml](./stacks/sure/compose.yaml): Sure Docker Compose
- [stacks/gitea/compose.yaml](./stacks/gitea/compose.yaml): Gitea Docker Compose
- [stacks/nocodb/compose.yaml](./stacks/nocodb/compose.yaml): NocoDB Docker Compose
- [stacks/databasus/compose.yaml](./stacks/databasus/compose.yaml): Databasus Docker Compose
- [stacks/n8n/compose.yaml](./stacks/n8n/compose.yaml): n8n Docker Compose
- [ansible/group_vars/all.yml](./ansible/group_vars/all.yml): All non-secret variables (domain, timezone, ports)
- [ansible/secrets.yml.example](./ansible/secrets.yml.example): Full list of required secrets with descriptions
- [.github/workflows/deploy-stacks.yml](./.github/workflows/deploy-stacks.yml): GitHub Actions workflow for path-based stack deploys
